name: Functional - Successful Incident Classification
description: Validates that the /classify endpoint correctly classifies and prioritizes a well-formed incident request.
input: POST /classify with IncidentRequest containing valid incident_description, impact, urgency, configuration_context, and service_context.
output: IncidentResponse with success=True, incident_type, priority, confidence_score, rationale, audit_log_entry, fallback=False, error=None.
